state.title: Run the test to check current failure

part.text:
The bug is clear: in `useCartState.mjs` line 7, `next.items.push(item)` mutates the original state object because `next` and `state.items` reference the same array. The test fails at assertion on line 8 (`assert.notEqual(next, state)`) because they reference the same object.

Fix by creating a new array instead of mutating:

metadata.diff:
Index: /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-20T06-38-17-288Z/dcp-react-state-bug-fix-3/repo/bench-targets/react-state/src/useCartState.mjs
===================================================================
--- /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-20T06-38-17-288Z/dcp-react-state-bug-fix-3/repo/bench-targets/react-state/src/useCartState.mjs
+++ /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-20T06-38-17-288Z/dcp-react-state-bug-fix-3/repo/bench-targets/react-state/src/useCartState.mjs
@@ -2,9 +2,11 @@
   return { items: [], total: 0 }
 }
 
 export function addItem(state, item) {
-  const next = state
-  next.items.push(item)
-  next.total = state.items.length
+  const next = { ...state }
+  const items = [...state.items]
+  items.push(item)
+  next.items = items
+  next.total = items.length
   return next
 }

filediff.patch:
Index: /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-20T06-38-17-288Z/dcp-react-state-bug-fix-3/repo/bench-targets/react-state/src/useCartState.mjs
===================================================================
--- /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-20T06-38-17-288Z/dcp-react-state-bug-fix-3/repo/bench-targets/react-state/src/useCartState.mjs
+++ /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-20T06-38-17-288Z/dcp-react-state-bug-fix-3/repo/bench-targets/react-state/src/useCartState.mjs
@@ -2,9 +2,11 @@
   return { items: [], total: 0 }
 }
 
 export function addItem(state, item) {
-  const next = state
-  next.items.push(item)
-  next.total = state.items.length
+  const next = { ...state }
+  const items = [...state.items]
+  items.push(item)
+  next.items = items
+  next.total = items.length
   return next
 }

part.text:
Fixed the state update bug in `useCartState.mjs` by creating proper copies on lines 6-9. `state` is no longer mutated when calling `addItem`. 

**Verification status**: ✓ Passed
